creator: P.Szmytka@iem.pw.edu.pl
text:
The Xorg server version 6.9 built from ports (x11-servers/xorg-server) doesn't recognize my video card (Nvidia GeForce Go 6150)

Fix: 

Apply a patch found in one of linux distros xorg source package. Rebuild xorg-server.
You can find instructions on how to do it here:
http://people.fruitsalad.org/adridg/bobulate/index.php?/archives/320-Thank-you,-openSUSE-from-a-FreeBSD-guy.html

I attached the patch that takes care of my card, but there are few more patches in  OpenSuse's srpm that may fix problems with other cards.
How-To-Repeat: purchase Nvidia GeForce Go 6150 based card ;)
install x11-servers/xorg-server
choose 'nv' as display driver in xorg.conf
